message:
feat(ghostty): add Linux headless EGL rendering support

Update ghostty vendor with headless EGL rendering for Linux:

- Add egl_headless.zig for dynamic EGL/GBM loading
- Support GBM platform for hardware GPU rendering
- Handle threadlocal glad context with must_draw_from_app_thread
- Rebuild libghostty.a with Linux headless support

This enables termweb-mux to run with real GPU rendering on Linux
servers without a display, using DRM render nodes for acceleration.
